final:
// // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the JK flip-flop will not toggle the output when both J and K are high, which is contrary to the specification.
module jk_flip_flop (
    input wire J,
    input wire K,
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            Q <= 1'b0; // Reset Q to 0
        end else begin
            case ({J, K})
                2'b00: Q <= Q;       // No change
                2'b01: Q <= 1'b0;    // Reset
                2'b10: Q <= 1'b1;    // Set
                2'b11: Q <= ~Q;      // Toggle
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule
